language.label: Language
language.meta: "System" follows your device language. More languages are coming; only English ships today.

profile.couldNotSaveDisplayName: Could not save your display name
profile.backingUpToCloud: Backing up your data to the cloud
profile.backingUpToCloudEllipsis: Backing up your data to the cloud…
profile.upgradeToProAndSync: Upgrade to Pro and sync across your devices

profile.uploadedItemsBackedUp_other: {{count}} items backed up to the cloud.

profile.couldNotBackUpToCloud: Could not back up your data to the cloud.
profile.dataSafeTryAgain: Your data is safe on this device. You can try again.
profile.switchToFreeMessage: Your data stays in the cloud, but Free mode stores everything on this device and stops syncing across your devices. You can switch back to Pro anytime.
profile.constraintNote: These restrictions are used by the Training Engine to avoid exercises that could aggravate your conditions.
profile.customRestrictionPlaceholder: e.g. avoid overhead pressing due to AC joint
profile.confirmEstimatedMaxesMeta: When on, you'll confirm each estimated 1RM before it affects your ranking. Off by default — rankings use estimates automatically.
profile.effortDisplayMeta: RPE 8 = RIR 2 — same number, different direction.
profile.showEffortAsRpeLabel: Show effort as RPE instead of RIR
profile.restAfterEveryExercise: Rest after every exercise in a circuit
profile.suggestedNextLoadsMeta: On-device suggestions for your next set's weight, from your recent history. Every suggestion shows its rule.
profile.enableSuggestedNextLoads: Enable suggested next loads in the logger
profile.couldNotSaveNotificationSetting: Could not save your notification setting
profile.couldNotSaveRestTimerSetting: Could not save rest timer setting
profile.couldNotSaveEffortDisplaySetting: Could not save effort display setting
profile.couldNotSaveSupersetRestSetting: Could not save superset rest setting
profile.readinessAndRecoveryMeta: Daily readiness score, muscle freshness & deload alerts
profile.exportMyDataMeta: Download your full workout history as JSON or CSV
profile.physicalRestrictionsNote: These constraints are shared with the Training Engine to avoid incompatible exercises.
profile.planNotificationsMeta: Notify when your plan is ready
profile.siriAndShortcutsMeta: Try "Hey Siri, log a set in Peak Fettle", "start a workout", or "start rest". Manage phrases in the Shortcuts app.
profile.openShortcutsApp: Open the Shortcuts app to manage Peak Fettle voice phrases
profile.healthMetricsMetaIos: Sync from Apple Health · HR, HRV, sleep
profile.importActivityData: Import activity data from Garmin or Strava
profile.deleteAccountConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
profile.areYouSureMessage: All your workouts, sets, plans and health data will be deleted permanently.
profile.signOutMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out?
profile.uploadedItemsBackedUp: {{count}} items backed up to the cloud.
profile.skippedItemsStayedOnDevice: {{count}} items stayed on this device (no online match).
